falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 index closes below 4000 (key support level) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakdown below this level would invalidate the bottom pattern and suggest continued bearish momentum, contradicting the HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume on the Nasdaq 100 exceeds 200% of the 30-day average during a 5% price rally
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a surge in volume during a rally would indicate strong buying pressure, directly contradicting the HOLD signal and suggesting a bullish reversal rather than a consolidation phase.

falsification_conditions.condition: The CBOE VIX volatility index drops below 15 (indicating complacency) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A VIX below 15 would contradict the blowoff score's implication of heightened volatility, invalidating the model's assumption of market stress and suggesting a false bottom scenario.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
